summary: Replicate the FRE|Nxt Claude and Codex operating stack with skills, plugin manifests, and bootstrap scripts.

inputs.name: replication_scope
inputs.description: Choose full stack replication or category-only rollout.

inputs.name: target_category
inputs.description: Developer workflow systems, reasoning frameworks, or domain playbooks.

inputs.name: profile_root
inputs.description: Optional local profile root for custom installation target.

outputs.name: installed_stack_manifest
outputs.description: List of installed skills, plugins, and scripts by category.

outputs.name: bootstrap_command_plan
outputs.description: Commands for full and category-only replication paths.

outputs.name: post_install_notes
outputs.description: Assumptions and environment-specific tuning required after bootstrap.

workflow_steps: Install baseline skills and plugin manifests into project-local stack directories.
Run full bootstrap or scoped category rollout script.
Sync selected skills and plugin settings to local profiles.
Review post-install assumptions and adjust environment-specific values.

verification.smoke_test: Execute category-only install for one taxonomy group and verify resulting manifests include both Claude and Codex plugin entries.
